title: Automation condition "only if ITEM NAME MEETS CONDITION"
excerpt:
Would love a new automation condition based on the Item Name. E.g. When new item is created; and only if ITEM NAME CONTAINS condition… 
I’m looking to create a way for items to be created when MS Form response is receive…

posts.author: RITOAR (Andrea Reed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would love a new automation condition based on the Item Name. E.g. When new item is created; and only if ITEM NAME CONTAINS condition…

I’m looking to create a way for items to be created when MS Form response is received. As there is currently no native integration with MS Forms, I can create a MS Flow to send an email to the board, but need to be able to allocate person and status based on conditions of Item Name.

Alternatively, a similar automation condition “only if UPDATE MEETS CONDITION”, would work.

Cheers

posts.author: josuexvolt (Josh Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here. This option could open the doors for task-specific autiomations, something of great value.

posts.author: hkjohn (jawn)
posts.cookedHtml: Also looking for this! I want to automatically add specific subitems when the item name contains XXXX

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RITOAR , @josuexvolt , @hkjohn ,

We recently launched the app Special Automations - monday.com App Marketplace which has the required automation recipe for your use case.

image2008×352 22.6 KB

Also if you want any other automation, do let us know at support@superworkday.com
